raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a pair of shoes from XXXX  in XXXX of XXXX. They issued me a return on order number XXXX for {$590.00}. XXXX. The shoes were picked up by XXXX tracking number XXXX and delivered back to XXXX. The pickup confirmation number is a m XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX despite receiving the shoes back and indicating in an email that I have enclosed that they would credit my Citi card they did not. Therefore, I opened a dispute with Citi card XX/XX/year>. XXXX then said because I had opened a dispute with Citicard they would not issue me the refund despite the fact they had sent me a label and the merchandise was returned. 

CitiCard initially credited back my card for the disputed amount but then within 21 days charged me the {$590.00} again. I talked with the customer service representative in the dispute Department numerous times and they refused to re-credit the disputed amount to my credit card despite giving them information that XXXX had picked up the package and XXXX  had received the merchandise. CitiCard did not re-credit the disputed amount until XX/XX/year>. 

I requested on numerous occasions to talk to someone outside of the dispute department and to escalate my complaint to the president 's office. I wrote a letter to Citi card and included all pertinent documentation and never received a response. Consequently, I closed my credit card after being a customer for 25 years. for 25 years I paid my entire balance off monthly, sometimes in excess of {$15000.00} and only had one other dispute filed in that amount of time.
